items.title: Meet the Battery Startup Taking on China’s Giants
items.summary: Solid-state batteries are safer and more capable—but harder to mass-produce. They also represent an opportunity for non-Chinese companies to get back in the game.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
